title: AVio joins as incubation partner and Jeroen Gerritsen appointed CMO
content_html:
Two pieces of news from the Cryptool team today.

Strategic partnership with AVio

Starting in January, AVio will work with Cryptool as an incubation and advisory partner. AVio brings deep experience supporting early-stage crypto projects, and that experience will feed directly into the projects launching through our platform.

Jeroen Gerritsen joins as CMO and Community Manager

We are excited to welcome Jeroen Gerritsen as Chief Marketing Officer. Jeroen brings a background in commerce, IT and data, with a strong focus on community building and marketing strategy. He will lead community growth, market analysis, partnership development and our social media work.

Both moves are part of preparing Cryptool for the launch of the platform and the ambassador program.
author: Cryptool
